layers.name: Search-Index Anomaly
layers.mechanism: Bing diagnostics show contradictory statuses and partial visibility
layers.one_liner: Bing previously returned zero visible results; a later site-search surfaced one non-investigative technical article and the captured first-page result set excluded the investigation corpus. Cause remains unresolved.

layers.name: Media Conflict Environment
layers.mechanism: Donor/board overlap creates structural friction around coverage
layers.one_liner: Public records show Luke-linked donor and board overlap around Civil Beat. The article frames this as a conflict environment while leaving any coverage order unproved.

layers.name: Judicial Sealing
layers.mechanism: Disputed visual allegation in an audio-only proceeding followed by sealing
layers.one_liner: The visual allegation is a firsthand observation. The sealed audio can test the timing, answer, attempted record statement, and cutoff.

layers.name: Oversight Nullification
layers.mechanism: 100% complaint dismissal rate for six consecutive years
layers.one_liner: 1,009 inquiries. 7 formal complaints. 0 sustained. Commissioner's spouse was an active judge for 21 years.

layers.name: Prosecution Blockade
layers.mechanism: AG statements create a public-record conflict over special counsel authority
layers.one_liner: 2024: 'The power already exists.' 2026: 'No such power exists.' The contradiction is documented; motive and internal rationale remain open.

layers.name: Report Suppression
layers.mechanism: Report-intake refusal allegedly prevents case-number generation
layers.one_liner: Policy says 'shall.' Officer said 'stop telling me how to do my job.' PSO said 'totality.' No written authority found.
layers.live_detail: HPD officer refused report intake, March 6, 2026, 8:10 AM HST

layers.name: Direct Threat
layers.mechanism: Reported murder threat, alleged witness tampering, and excluded testimony
layers.one_liner: Two voices, two roles, one message. 'Stay away from Jack.' 'Or you'll be whacked.' The jury never heard it.
